---
title: "Question 2: Plug Load & Appliances Analysis"
author: "Penny Hunter"
date: "2026-05-13"
output: html_document
---

Note: This file is designed to be run after Question 1 rmd

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo      = TRUE,
  message   = FALSE,
  warning   = FALSE,
  fig.align = "center"
)

library(tidyverse)
library(scales)
library(cowplot)
```

## 1.0 Filter to Plug Load & Appliances

```{r}
# Filter claims to Plug Load and Appliances program group
plug_load <- claims_record_2020 %>%
  filter(`Program Group` == "Plug Load and Appliances")

# Quick check — claims count, PA breakdown, program breakdown
nrow(plug_load)
plug_load %>% count(PA, sort = TRUE)
plug_load %>% count(`Program ID`, sort = TRUE)
```

## 2.0 Overall Savings Summary

```{r}
# Overall program totals — numbers cited in report overview paragraph
plug_load %>%
  summarise(
    total_kWh    = sum(`First Year Gross kWh`, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_kW     = sum(`First Year Gross kW`, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_Therm  = sum(`First Year Gross Therm`, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_rebate = sum(`End User Rebate`, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_claims     = n()
  )
```

## 3.0 Savings by Measure

```{r}
# 78 unique measures — top by kWh
savings_by_measure <- plug_load %>%
  group_by(`Measure Description`) %>%
  summarise(
    total_kWh    = sum(`First Year Gross kWh`, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_Therm  = sum(`First Year Gross Therm`, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_rebate = sum(`End User Rebate`, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_claims     = n()
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(total_kWh))

print(savings_by_measure)
```

## 4.0 Savings by Technology Group

```{r}
# Cleaner grouping than measure level — 12 technology groups
plug_load %>%
  group_by(`Technology Group`) %>%
  summarise(
    total_kWh    = sum(`First Year Gross kWh`, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_Therm  = sum(`First Year Gross Therm`, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_rebate = sum(`End User Rebate`, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_claims     = n()
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(total_kWh))
```

```{r}
# Prepare data
savings_by_tech <- plug_load %>%
  group_by(`Technology Group`) %>%
  summarise(
    kWh   = sum(`First Year Gross kWh`, na.rm = TRUE),
    Therm = sum(`First Year Gross Therm`, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(kWh, Therm),
               names_to  = "Savings_Type",
               values_to = "Value") %>%
  filter(Value > 0)

# Top panel — dx HP Equipment only
top_panel <- savings_by_tech %>%
  filter(`Technology Group` == "dx HP Equipment") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = `Technology Group`, y = Value, fill = Savings_Type)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  geom_text(aes(label = comma(round(Value, 0))),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.9),
            hjust = -0.1, size = 3) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("kWh" = "steelblue", "Therm" = "gold")) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = comma, expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.2))) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, fill = "Savings Type") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank())

# Bottom panel — all other technology groups
bottom_panel <- savings_by_tech %>%
  filter(`Technology Group` != "dx HP Equipment") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(`Technology Group`, Value), y = Value, fill = Savings_Type)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  geom_text(aes(label = comma(round(Value, 0))),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.9),
            hjust = -0.1, size = 3) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("kWh" = "steelblue", "Therm" = "gold")) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = comma, expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.2))) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Savings", fill = "Savings Type") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank())

# Combine with split axis
fig4_savings <- plot_grid(
  ggdraw() + draw_label(
    "Plug Load & Appliances: Energy Savings by Technology Group (2020)",
    fontface = "bold", size = 12
  ),
  plot_grid(top_panel, bottom_panel, ncol = 1,
            rel_heights = c(0.12, 0.88), align = "v"),
  ncol = 1, rel_heights = c(0.05, 0.95)
)

print(fig4_savings)
ggsave("figure4_savings_by_tech.png", plot = fig4_savings,
       width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)
```

## 5.0 Customer Segments

```{r}
# Building type breakdown — 96.7% figure cited in report
plug_load_customers <- plug_load %>%
  count(`Building Type`, name = "Number_of_Claims") %>%
  arrange(desc(Number_of_Claims)) %>%
  mutate(Pct = round(Number_of_Claims / sum(Number_of_Claims) * 100, 1))

print(plug_load_customers)
```

## 6.0 Rebates by Technology Group

```{r}
# Rebates by technology group
rebates_by_tech <- plug_load %>%
  group_by(`Technology Group`) %>%
  summarise(total_rebate = sum(`End User Rebate`, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  filter(total_rebate > 0) %>%
  arrange(desc(total_rebate))

fig5_rebates <- ggplot(
  rebates_by_tech,
  aes(x = reorder(`Technology Group`, total_rebate), y = total_rebate)
) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "darkgreen") +
  geom_text(aes(label = comma(round(total_rebate, 0))),
            hjust = -0.1, size = 3) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = dollar, expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +
  labs(
    title = "Plug Load & Appliances: Rebates by Technology Group (2020)",
    x     = "Technology Group",
    y     = "Total Rebates (USD)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

print(fig5_rebates)
ggsave("figure5_rebates_by_tech.png", plot = fig5_rebates,
       width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```
